title: JKSSB – Electrician, Plumber and More – 130 Posts

basic_details.job_title: JKSSB Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 130 Electrician, Plumber and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The JKSSB has released 130 Electrician, Plumber and More vacancies. Eligible candidates with Any Graduate, BCA, B.Sc, Diploma, ITI, B.Lib can apply online on or before July 21, 2026, at jkssb.nic.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Agriculture Production, ARI & Trainings, Industries & Commerce, Higher Education, Home Department, Law Justice & Parliamentary Affairs
basic_details.post_name: Various Posts (Boiler Mechanic, Senior Horticulture Technician, Laboratory Assistant, Computer Assistant, Library Assistant, Electrician, and more)

qualification.education_qualification: Varies by post as prescribed in Annexure-A of the notification.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level SL1 to Level 6F (as per post)

how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the JKSSB official portal at https://jkssb.nic.in. Detailed instructions for filling the online application will be made available on the Board’s website separately. No other mode of application will be accepted.
seo_tags: Jammu and Kashmir Services Selection Board Electrician
